# NLModel.ModelType.sequence

**Case**

A sequence model type that tags text at the token level.

## Declaration

```swift
case sequence
```

## Model types

- **NLModel.ModelType.classifier**: A classifier model type that tags text at the phrase, sentence, paragraph, or higher level.

items.description: A classifier model type that tags text at the phrase, sentence, paragraph, or higher level.
items.name: NLModel.ModelType.classifier
